name: StandardAero, Inc.
businessModelSummary: StandardAero is a leading provider of Maintenance, Repair & Overhaul (MRO) services and custom solutions for commercial aviation, business aviation, military, and industrial power customers. The company generates revenue through engine MRO services, installation, engineering design, and system integration services, leveraging a diversified global footprint including facilities in North America and the UK. StandardAero operates as a subsidiary of The Carlyle Group Inc.
suppliers: Engine Manufacturers (Rolls-Royce, Pratt & Whitney, General Electric)
